description_long: This is a modern, front-loading washing machine with a rectangular, boxy shape and a predominantly white exterior. The front features a large circular door with a transparent window, through which the blue-tinted drum interior is partially visible. Above the door, there is a control panel with a combination of buttons, a rotary dial, and a digital display, as well as a detergent drawer on the left side. The sides and back of the machine are plain, with subtle paneling and a recessed area on the rear for utility connections. The overall design is sleek and functional, typical of contemporary household appliances. The machine appears robust and is likely constructed from metal and plastic components.
description: A white, front-loading washing machine with a large circular door, visible blue drum, and a detailed control panel on the front.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular door with a transparent window, blue drum inside, control panel with buttons, dial, digital display, and detergent drawer.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a plain, white panel with vertical indents and no visible controls or openings.
description_view_2: Rear view featuring a recessed panel with geometric detailing, likely for utility connections, and no visible controls.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with a plain white panel and vertical indents.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is located at the top front of the machine, featuring a detergent drawer on the left, two round buttons, a central rotary dial, and a digital display with additional buttons on the right. The layout is linear and user-friendly, with clear separation between controls.
attribute_door_type: Front-loading circular door with a transparent glass window, white plastic rim, and a visible integrated handle on the right side.
attribute_brand_logo: A logo is visible on the detergent drawer at the top left, displaying the text 'WASHTECH'.
attribute_detergent_drawer_location: The detergent drawer is visible at the top left of the front panel, integrated into the control panel, and has a rectangular shape with a handle.
attribute_drum_visibility: The drum is partially visible through the transparent window of the front door, showing a blue-tinted interior.
